reviews.title: We did enjoy our stay.
reviews.positives:
This is a nice resort. We stayed at the Luxury Resort. We had a villa with private pool.
We really enjoyed, as we were on our honeymoon. There were not many people there, so that was nice for us.
The staff were very helpful when we asked for anything. 
We did order room service 1 time. My wife ordered pineapple shrimp fried rice. It was a generous portion and she said it tasted good. I ordered pizza. I would not do that again...

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Very disappointed with the overall hotel stay.  I booked a pool villa and was assigned a different villa which was very disappointing, small bedroom with another room which I don't need. During the check-in, the receptionist didn't mention the changes in the room nor explained. I only realised it when I arrived and see that the villa is not what I booked initially.  The staff who send us to the villa by buggy also didn't assist with the rooming to explain on room facilities. Is this 5-star Luxury hotel? Also on 21/3 after my massage, the buggy personnel alight us half-way to our villa and told us to walk back since he is transporting another lady.  Why can't he send us to our room since the hotel is not busy? The overall room's furniture, carpentry works and amenities in the villa doesn't project the image of a 5 Star Luxury Resort!  All the staff at the hotel need training.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Rahman,

Thank you for choosing our hotel for your vacation and for taking time to feedback to us. 

It is so pity for us to know that our hotel did not bring completed comfortability during your staying time. We are very sorry about that. 

All your comment will be shared to all related departments and improve accordingly.

We look forward to welcoming you and your family back to the hotel in the near future.

Kind Regards,

Lam Minh
Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Ein toller Familienurlaub, mit tollem Essen, Pools und Stränden.
reviews.positives: Ein tolles Hotel, super reichhaltiges und großes Frühstücksbuffet, das keinen Wunsch offen lässt. Sehr freundlich auch den Kindern gegenüber. Große Zimmer mit eigenem Pool, alles sauber und gepflegt. Wir hätten gern alle vorhandenen Aktivitäten ausprobiert, da diese sehr toll aussahen.
reviews.negatives: Normalerweise sollten bis Anfang/Mitte November alle 12 Restaurants offen haben und viele Erlebnisse für die Kinder innerhalb der Anlage. Leider war alles schon geschlossen, sodass wir ein Restaurant zur Auswahl hatten und man innerhalb der Anlage nur Golf oder Tennis spielen konnte, alles andere wurde nicht mehr angeboten.

reviews.title: The receptionist has a bad attitude and lacks professionalism.
reviews.text: I booked a room through Agoda, for 2 adults and 2 children (4 and 7 years old). On Agoda, it stated that the amount I paid already included costs for both children. After traveling quite a long distance, when we arrived, a male receptionist informed me that my reservation did not include the 7-year-old, and there would be an additional charge. I explained and requested that they contact Agoda for support, asking to check in so we could rest first, and that if there was a family fee, I would come down to pay or settle the payment when leaving the accommodation. However, we had to wait there for nearly 60 minutes, and the energetic young children running around were reprimanded and scolded by that same male receptionist. It wasn't until another female receptionist came out that we were finally "assisted" to check in around 4 PM, even though I had already paid in full. Ultimately, I received a call from Agoda due to a "oversight," asking for my understanding and payment of the remaining amount, while the accommodation and that receptionist perhaps felt I was at fault, so they didn’t offer any explanation to my family. The end of our stay with 2 nights at FLC made me feel frustrated and uncomfortable from the moment we arrived. If I hadn't paid for the room in advance, I would have left right then. The room was clean, and breakfast was not a buffet because there were too few guests. Due to one receptionist, the image of the entire resort was tarnished. It's truly a pity!

- villa facing the beach, clean room. 
Not-so-good points:

- Check-in had to be done at the grand hotel area, and the guard explained that the resort's reception was closed due to the holiday. Quite inconvenient. 
- I referred to the spa price list and showed the information for a 15% discount, but the staff gave me a different price list that was higher than what they had just provided. Ridiculous. 
>>>> overall accommodation experience was very ordinary.

reviews.title: Everything is fine, except for the stairs at the pool, the refrigerator, and the breakfast coffee.
reviews.text:
The room is beautiful, clean, and well-equipped. The beach is probably the most enjoyable part in the North. The saddest thing is the mini fridge, which is as good as non-existent; it's very weak and does not cool at all. The morning coffee is not free; instead of offering free freshly brewed coffee from a fancy machine, they only provide bitter coffee that doesn't have the fresh aroma of pure coffee, and it is pre-mixed with condensed milk. Oh dear, it’s very bad! It made me lose my appetite for breakfast, especially criticizing the cheap frozen dumplings. 

The most concerning aspect is the steps at the pool of each villa. They made too many steps of the same color extending right into the middle of the pool; just a little careless misstep could lead to bleeding. It's very hard to see them because they are not lined with reflective edges; you have to feel your way step by step. Thus, movement in the pool area is limited to a very short and very boring section.

Even so, the house cleaning was done very well, and the room was so lovely that I was completely satisfied, not minding a few minor issues. The cost performance is excellent. If I can stay in such a room at that price, it's definitely worth it. I also regretted that I should have stayed one more night since the weather was bad in the first half.

reviews.title: FLC resort needs to upgrade its facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.text:
I really like the scenery and location of this jhgu Resort, especially the sea view villa, which is very spacious and has a direct view of the ocean. At night, lying by the private pool while listening to the gentle waves is truly enjoyable. 
However, in recent years, the landscaping within the premises has not been well-maintained; it no longer has the lush greenery and cleanliness. The grass and plants around the villa are also not taken care of, the outdoor lights are broken and have not been replaced, and there are no lights by the pool. I recommend that the investor make improvements.

reviews.title: Very good!
reviews.positives:
We enjoyed our stay at the pool suite with view on the beach! The villa is huge with heigh ceilings and a lot of daylight. The bed is very comfortable and big (wide) but if you're really tall you're feet might stick out.

Breakfast is delicious and very varied.
The swimmingpool and the spa are amazing, very pretty.
The staff is incredibly friendly and attentive. They help you with ordering a taxi to do some groceries and overall they want to make your stay to be as pleasant as possible.
The private beach is swimmable but the water is a bit sandy and sometimes some trash comes onto the shore. It is nice to have a stroll on the beach though. 

The resort is a little bit run down, but overall it's a beautiful little paradise. The resort is a great place to calm down and have a relaxing holiday with your friends or family instead of exploring. I really recommend if that's what you're looking for :)
reviews.negatives:
We came in low season (August) so there were not many guests.
It was sometimes hard to communicate with the staff in English (they tried their best wich was amazing though) but beforehand we communicated about a gluten allergy and the staff couldn't tell us which meals were gluten free (mainly due the English skills). And sadly there were also no gluten free options (pasta, bread etc.)
A tip for the restaurant would be to have the menu updated and showing little symbols which each meal (vegetarian, vegan, gluten free etc.)

In this hot climate there were a lot of bugs and the frontdoor had a little gap (so we put a towel on the floor at night) to keep the bugs out.

I'd loved a few utensils in the kitchen (just fork, knife etc, not much more).

I'd also loved a folder in the hotel room with basic information about the resort! Like opening times for the restaurant, public swimmingpool etc. And a map! That would have been great to have at the start of the holiday and I think more guests would appreciate that.

Thank you for the stay!

reviews.title: The best place for total relaxation
reviews.positives:
I would like to share my impressions from my vacation at FLC Resort Luxury Samson.

We stayed there in the middle of November, 6 nights from November 17 to 23, 2024, in a deluxe room with an ocean view.

 As it turned out it was low season in the town of Chamchon and at the resort itself, there were almost no tourists. Hotel manager Mr. Hop said that in summer the resort is crowded. My special thanks to Mr. Hop for his attention and help!

I was surprised by the low ratings of the resort on booking and other sites, because we had just an unforgettable vacation, the most real luxury from the beginning to the last minutes.

I have read many reviews that the staff does not understand English well. Indeed not all staff speak perfect English, but nowadays google translate solves this problem in seconds. There is excellent wi-fi all over the hotel, I had no problems watching movies or having meetings online.

We stayed with my daughter in an ocean view deluxe room with a private pool and it is truly an unforgettable experience. The ocean is beautiful and the lush very well maintained plants around the houses and along the beach are pleasing to the eye and create shade. For relaxation lovers, this is the best choice because the noise of the ocean makes you forget everything.

I saw complaints in other reviews that there is no beach and there is only a concrete wall. That's not really the case. I think that what FLC Samson has done is brilliant, because on the border of the land and the beach there is a concrete fence with poured stones, which prevents the ocean from eroding the shore and the shore remains very green, there are palm trees and conifer plants, and you can go down to the beach by numerous stairs. The regular beach starts outside the resort borders in the town, it's a 5 minute walk.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
I have been associated with FLC Sam Son Resort for 4 years now. Every year I return 1-2 times because the spacious and convenient vacation space is very suitable for my family. Each time the staff takes care of even the simplest tasks thoroughly. Close, friendly, and endearing are the words I find most fitting. 
However, I hope FLC can pay more attention to arranging and distributing the electric cars to serve faster. I know customer demand will be higher on rainy days and during meal times, but this time I had to wait for an hour without a car available. It is truly disappointing! 
I really hope FLC can address this only drawback! Thank you FLC for giving me a trip full of joy, and thank you for reading customer notes so thoroughly 🥰

reviews.title: Great for a family vacation.
reviews.text: My family and friends had a wonderful experience staying at FLC. The two-bedroom sea-view villa was spacious, and the private pool was large, unlike those at other places, so the family didn't need to go to the communal pool. A bonus was that the pool came equipped with two floats, and all the bathrooms were equipped with Toto smart toilets. In front of the villa, there was a wide lawn for the kids to play. The staff was friendly, and calling for electric cars to move around was very quick. The à la carte lunch featuring Northern rice dishes was delicious and reasonably priced. My family often stays at FLC, and next time we will definitely choose the villa area at FLC Luxury again.

reviews.title: Resort đã xuống cấp đáng kể
reviews.text: Mình có đặt tại FLC 2 đêm, hạng pool villa hướng vườn. Khu rs đã xây dựng được khoảng gần 10 năm, đến nay đã xuống cấp đáng kể, đặc biệt mình thấy vấn đề vệ sinh ko đảm bảo, bể bơi siêu bẩn và sặc mùi clo nên 2 ngày mình ở đây k có 1 khách nào dám xuống bể bơi, wc đã cũ và ố vàng, chăn ga 2 ngày thay 1 lần và cảm giác ko thơm tho khô ráo. Nhà hàng các món ăn cũng k đc đa dạng và đặc sắc. Tuy nhiên, mình khá hài lòng vs khu spa, các bạn nhân viên rất chu đáo và lịch sự. Rất mong chủ đt quan tâm đến dự án và nâng cao chất lượng sử dụng dv cho khách hàng trong thời gian tới
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những lời nhận xét của mình về trải nghiệm dịch vụ trong thời gian nghỉ dưỡng tại FLC Luxury Resort Sầm Sơn. Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi quý khách về những sự bất tiện đã gặp phải và chúng tôi xin ghi nhận để có phương án cải thiện và phát huy thêm những dịch vụ tiện ích hiện tại của quần thể. 
Xin trân trọng cảm ơn và rất mong quý khách sớm quay lại để chúng tôi có cơ hội phục vụ quý khách tốt hơn vào những lần ghé thăm tiếp theo. 
Trân trọng,
Ban quản lý
FLC Samson Beach & Golf Resort

reviews.title: Đánh giá
reviews.text: Phòng tắm nước cực yếu, có lúc đang tắm bị mất nước. Nước nóng không có luôn phải đợi 5p mới có, nghi ngờ bể bơi không thay nước thường xuyên. Nhân viên kĩ thuật hỗ trợ giải thích do tất cả khu đều bị vậy. Thật ko xứng đáng với khu nghỉ dưỡng 5 sao
reviews.response: Kính chào Quý khách, Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những lời nhận xét của mình và đánh giá về trải nghiệm dịch vụ trong thời gian nghỉ dưỡng tại FLC Luxury Resort Sầm Sơn. Sự đánh giá nhận xét của Quý khách là nguồn động viên cực kỳ ý nghĩa cho đội ngũ Quản lý, CBNV của FLC Luxury Resort Sầm Sơn để nỗ lực, và cải thiện dịch vụ khách sạn, mang đến trải nghiệm thú vị cho khách hàng. Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn ý kiến đóng góp cũng như thời gian quý báu của Quý khách. Trân trọng, Ban quản lý FLC Samson Beach & Golf Resort

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Chậm trễ trong giải quyết sự cố kg phải lỗi của khách, gọi hotline báo  lần đầu nv nghe máy, trình bày và đợi mãi kg thấy nv vào xử lý cho dù lúc đó gần 1h sáng , gọi lại kg tài nào gọi đc. Khi đc đổi sang phòng khác thì điều hoà cả đêm kg mát nổi.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,
Chúng tôi vô cùng cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian để chia sẻ ý kiến về những trải nghiệm tại khách sạn FLC Luxury Resort Samson. Chúng tôi thành thật lấy làm tiếc vì những trải nghiệm này không để lại ấn tượng tốt đẹp. Thay mặt Ban Quản lý Khách sạn, cho phép tôi bày tỏ lời xin lỗi chân thành nhất tới Quý khách.
Những phản hồi này của Quý khách sẽ giúp chúng tôi nhìn nhận và cải thiện tốt hơn dịch vụ của mình. Nếu Quý khách cho chúng tôi một cơ hội để lấy lại lòng tin của Quý khách, chúng tôi có thể đảm bảo sẽ làm hết sức mình để mang lại cho Quý khách những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời.
Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn ý kiến đóng góp cũng như thời gian quý báu của Quý khách.
Trân trọng,
Ban quản lý
FLC Samson Beach & Golf Resort

reviews.title: Nghỉ dưỡng
reviews.text:
Ko có hoa quả chào đón  , nhân viên lễ tân ko mời nước , lấy thẻ giữ đồ ở sảnh thôi mà nhân viên loay hoay 20 phút. 
Đặt xe điện trước để sang sân golf mà đón muộn 15 phút.  Vòi nước tắm thì yếu, nước biển vừa mưa xong nên 2 màu như nước sông. 
Nếu để nghĩ dưỡng thì chọn nơi khác để được take care  tốt hơn.

Cảm ơn chị đã lựa chọ FLC Samson làm điểm dừng chân cho chuyến hành trình của mình.

Hiện tại, nấu ăn tại phòng là không được phép tại FLC Samson, do đó, chúng tôi không trang bị các vật dụng này tại phòng. Rất cảm ơn lời đánh giá của chị và hi vọng được đón tiếp chị trở lại FLC Samson trong thời gian tới.

H.Burns,

reviews.title: Hài Lòng
reviews.text: Mình đi gia đình nhỏ gồm 2 người lớn, 2 trẻ em (dưới 5 tuổi) trong mùa dịch Covid. Khá hài lòng vì căn villa private có cả bể bơi nên cũng yên tâm phần nào trong mùa dịch (trước khi checkin được cũng phải gửi thông tin để loại trừ KH từ vùng dịch). Dịch vụ và nhân viên đầy đủ và nhiệt tình, cao điểm có hơi ít xe điện 1 chút nhưng nhìn chung là không phải đợi lâu. Đồ ăn sáng đầy đủ mặc dù không quá đặc biệt. Mô hình chung sẽ quay khi có cơ hội.
reviews.response:

Lê Nguyệt

reviews.response: Kính chào Quý khách, Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những lời nhận xét của mình và đánh giá về trải nghiệm dịch vụ trong thời gian nghỉ dưỡng tại FLC Luxury Resort Sầm Sơn. Sự đánh giá nhận xét của Quý khách là nguồn động viên cực kỳ ý nghĩa cho đội ngũ Quản lý, CBNV của FLC Luxury Resort Sầm Sơn để nỗ lực, và cải thiện dịch vụ khách sạn, mang đến trải nghiệm thú vị cho khách hàng. Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn ý kiến đóng góp cũng như thời gian quý báu của Quý khách. Trân trọng, Ban quản lý FLC Samson Beach & Golf Resort
